settings.heading: How does personalization work?
settings.row_content: Choose the product, enter the personalization details requested on the product page, and review spelling carefully before checkout.

settings.heading: What materials are used?
settings.row_content: Materials can vary by piece and are listed on each product page when confirmed. North & Pearl avoids material and performance claims unless they are verified for that specific item.

settings.heading: How long will my order take?
settings.row_content: Some personalized pieces may require production time before shipping. Product pages and checkout messaging should be reviewed for the clearest available timing before you place an order.

settings.heading: Can personalized items be returned?
settings.row_content: Personalized and custom items are generally final sale unless they arrive defective, damaged, or incorrect. Contact support before starting any return or exchange request.
